self.host_mamba_ref_counter = 0\n91\t        # store the host indices of KV cache\n92\t        self.host_value = None\n93\t        # store hash values of each pages\n94\t        self.hash_value: Optional[List[str]] = None\n95\t\n96\t        # for lru list, invariant:\n97\t        # 1. prev has greater last_access_time\n98\t        # 2. next has smaller last_access_time\n99\t        self.prev = None\n100\t        self.next = None\n101\t        self.mamba_prev = None\n102\t        self.mamba_next = None\n103\t        self.host_mamba_prev = None\n104\t        self.host_mamba_next = None\n105\t\n106\t        self.id = TreeNode.counter if id is None else id\n107\t        TreeNode.counter += 1\n108\t\n109\t    @property\n110\t    def evicted(self):\n111\t        return self.value is None\n112\t\n113\t    @property\n114\t    def mamba_evicted(self):\n115\t        return self.mamba_value is None\n116\t\n117\t    @property\n118\t    def backuped(self):\n119\t        return self.host_value is not None\n120\t\n121\t    @property\n122\t    def mamba_backuped(self):\n123\t        return self.mamba_host_value is not None\n124\t\n125\t    def protect_host(self):\n126\t        \"\"\"Protect the host KV value from eviction.\"\"\"\n127\t        self.host_ref_counter += 1\n128\t\n129\t    def release_host(self):\n130\t        \"\"\"Release the host KV value, allowing it to be evicted.\"\"\"\n131\t        if self.host_ref_counter > 0:\n132\t            self.host_ref_counter -= 1\n133\t        else:\n134\t            raise RuntimeError(\"Host reference counter is already zero.\")\n135\t\n136\t    def protect_host_mamba(self):\n137\t        \"\"\"Protect the host mamba value from eviction.\"\"\"\n138\t        self.host_mamba_ref_counter += 1\n139\t\n140\t    def self.host_mamba_ref_counter -= 1\n144\t        else:\n145\t            raise RuntimeError(\"Host mamba reference counter is already zero.\")\n146\t\n147\t    def get_last_hash_value(self) -> (most recently used)\"\"\"\n189\t        self._add_node_after(self.head, node)\n190\t\n191\t    def _add_node_after(self, old_node, new_node):\n192\t        \"\"\"Helper to add node right after get_prev_no_lock(\n283\t        self, node: TreeNode, check_id: bool = True\n284\t    ) -> Optional[TreeNode]:\n285\t        \"\"\"\n286\t        Get the previous (i.e. more recently used) node that this is expensive, only use for debug or idle check\n363\t    def sanity_check(self, tree_cache: \"MambaRadixCache\"):\n364\t        \"\"\"\n365\t        Check if the lru list is valid by rebuilding the lru list from the tree, heapifying it, and\n366\t        checking if the lru list is valid.\n367\t        \"\"\"\n368\t        try:\n369\t            if self.mamba:\n370\t                nodes = tree_cache._collect_nontombstone_nodes()\n371\t            else:\n372\t                nodes = tree_cache._collect_all_nodes()\n373\t            total_nodes = len(nodes)\n374\t            total_lru = _evict_leaf_node(\n730\t        self, x: TreeNode, is_evict_mamba: bool\n731\t    ) -> Tuple[int, int, TreeNode, TreeNode]:\n732\t        assert (\n733\t            x.full_lock_ref == 0 and x.mamba_lock_ref == 0\n734\t        ), f\"evict leaf node invalid with {x.id=} {x.full_lock_ref=} {x.mamba_lock_ref=}\"\n735\t\n736\t        assert x.mamba_value is not None, f\"leaf node mamba value is not None, {x.id=}\"\n737\t        # 1. a leaf node, free full tokens and mamba\n738\t        self.token_to_kv_pool_allocator.free(x.value)\n739\t        full_num_evicted = len(x.value)\n740\t is_evict_mamba:\n745\t            x_next = self.mamba_lru_list.get_prev_no_lock(x)\n746\t        else:\n747\t            x_next = self.full_lru_list.get_prev_leaf_no_lock(x)\n748\t        self.full_lru_list.remove_node(x)\n749\t        self.mamba_lru_list.remove_node(x)\n750\t\n751\t        # 3. delete the leaf node\n752\t        self._delete_leaf(x)\n753\t\n754\t        # 4. Returns the number of mamba states evicted.\"\"\"\n777\t        if self.disable or mamba_num <= 0:\n778\t            return 0\n779\t        # get the least recently used node that is not locked, doesn't have to be a leaf\n780\t        x = self.mamba_lru_list.get_lru_no_lock()\n781\t        mamba_num_evicted = 0\n782\t        # evict lru leaf nodes until mamba_num_tokens is reached\n783\t        while mamba_num_evicted < mamba_num and (self.mamba_lru_list.in_list(x)):\n784\t            assert x.mamba_value is not None, f\"node has no mamba value, {x.id=}\"\n785\t            assert (\n786\t                len(x.mamba_value) == 1\n787\t            ), f\"node has abnormal mamba length, {x.id=}, {len(x.mamba_value)=}\"\n788\t            assert x != self.root_node, f\"root node is not evictable, {x.id=}\"\n789\t            assert x.mamba_lock_ref == 0, f\"node is in use by mamba kv indices, {x.id=}\"\n790\t\n791\t            if len(x.children) > 0:\n792\t                # 1. an internal node, free mamba tokens.\n793\t                self.req_to_token_pool.mamba_pool.free(x.mamba_value)\n794\t                mamba_num_evicted += len(x.mamba_value)\n795\t\n796\t                # 2. get the next node, update the lru lists\n797\t                x_next = self.mamba_lru_list.get_prev_no_lock(x)\n798\t                self.mamba_lru_list.remove_node(x)\n799\t\n800\t                # 3. tombstone the node\n801\t                self._tombstone_internal_node(x)\n802\t            else:\n803\t                _, mamba_evicted_delta, _, x_next = self._evict_leaf_node(x, True)\n804\t                mamba_num_evicted += mamba_evicted_delta\n805\t\n806\t            x = x_next\n807\t\n808\t        return mamba_num_evicted\n809\t\n810\t    def evict_full(self, full_num_tokens: int) -> int:\n811\t        \"\"\"Evict full KV cache. Returns the number of tokens evicted.\"\"\"\n812\t        if self.disable or full_num_tokens <= 0:\n813\t            return 0\n814\t\n815\t        full_num_evicted = 0\n816\t        # get the least recently used leaf node that is not locked\n817\t        x = self.full_lru_list.get_leaf_lru_no_lock()\n818\t\n819\t        while full_num_evicted < full_num_tokens and self.full_lru_list.in_list(x):\n820\t            assert (\n821\t                x != self.root_node\n822\t            ), f\"root node should not exist in full lru list, {x.id=}\"\n823\t            full_num_evicted_delta, _, x, x_next = self._evict_leaf_node(x, False)\n824\t            full_num_evicted += full_num_evicted_delta\n825\t\n826\t            # if parent has no more children, it is a leaf. IncLockRefResult:\n836\t        \"\"\"\n837\t        Increment the lock reference count for the node.\n838\t        It locks the full_lock_ref for nodes between the [last node, root), exclusive.\n839\t        It locks the mamba_lock_ref for current node if its mamba_value exists.\n840\t        \"\"\"\n841\t        if self.disable:\n842\t            return _match_prefix_helper(\n957\t        self, key: RadixKey\n958\t    ) -> Tuple[List[torch.Tensor], TreeNode, int]:\n959\t        \"\"\"\n960\t        Mamba prefix matching helper. It factors in the sliding window size such that\n961\t        the matched node is guaranteed to either 1. connected to root without mamba tombstone,\n962\t        or 2. the number of matching tokens from the matched node to the last mamba tombstone\n963\t        node is greater than or equal to the sliding window size.\n964\t        \"\"\"\n965\t        node = self.root_node\n966\t        child_key = self.get_child_key_fn(key)\n967\t\n968\t        value: List[torch.Tensor] = []\n969\t        best_value_len = 0\n970\t        best_last_node = node\n971\t        while len(key) > 0 and child_key in node.children.keys():\n972\t            child = node.children[child_key]\n973\t            # update best_value_len and best_last_node if needed\n974\t            if node.mamba_value is not None:\n975\t                best_value_len = len(value)\n976\t                best_last_node = node\n977\t\n978\t            prefix_len = self.key_match_fn(child.key, key)\n979\t            if prefix_len < len(child.key):\n980\t                new_node = self._split_node(child.key, child, prefix_len)\n981\t                value.append(new_node.value)\n982\t                node = new_node\n983\t                break\n984\t            else:\n985\t                value.append(child.value)\n986\t                node = child\n987\t                key = key[prefix_len:]\n988\t\n989\t                if len(key):\n990\t                    child_key = self.get_child_key_fn(key)\n991\t        # handle best_value_len and best_last_node, for the case that last node is fully matched\n992\t        if node.mamba_value is not None:\n993\t            best_value_len = len(value)\n994\t            best_last_node = node\n995\t\n996\t        return value, best_last_node, best_value_len\n997\t\n998\t    def _match_pre_processor(self, params: MatchPrefixParams) -> Optional[RadixKey]:\n999\t        \"\"\"Preprocess the key before matching.\"\"\"\n1000\t        key = params.key\n1001\t\n1002\t        if self.disable or len(key) == 0:\n1003\t            return None\n1004\t\n1005\t        return key\n1006\t\n1007\t    def _match_post_processor(\n1008\t        self,\n1009\t        params: MatchPrefixParams,\n1010\t        value: List[torch.Tensor],\n1011\t        last_node: TreeNode,\n1012\t        best_value_len: int,\n1013\t    ) -> MatchResult:\n1014\t        \"\"\"Post-process the matched result.\"\"\"\n1015\t        cow_mamba = params.cow_mamba\n1016\t        req = params.req\n1017\t\n1018\t        # update time for matched nodes, and make nodes closer to root to be least recently used\n1019\t        # this allows mamba to evict nodes closer to root first\n1020\t        node_update = last_node\n1021\t        self.full_lru_list.reset_node_and_parents_mru(node_update, self.root_node)\n1022\t        self.mamba_lru_list.reset_node_and_parents_mru(node_update, self.root_node)\n1023\t\n1024\t        # This last_access_time is for sanity check, can be deleted after validation in production\n1025\t        cur_time = get_last_access_time()\n1026\t        while node_update:\n1027\t            node_update.last_access_time = cur_time\n1028\t            cur_time -= (\n1029\t                0.00001  # assuming less than 100000 nodes in a branch of the tree\n1030\t            )\n1031\t            node_update = node_update.parent\n1032\t\n1033\t        # Calculate the branching point. It is defined as the last aligned position that\n1034\t        # does not have a mamba value.\n1035\t        if len(value) > best_value_len:\n1036\t            mamba_cache_chunk_size = get_global_server_args().mamba_cache_chunk_size\n1037\t            mamba_cache_chunk_aligned_seqlen = (\n1038\t                sum(len(v) for v in value) // mamba_cache_chunk_size\n1039\t            ) * mamba_cache_chunk_size\n1040\t            mamba_branching_seqlen = (\n1041\t                mamba_cache_chunk_aligned_seqlen\n1042\t                if mamba_cache_chunk_aligned_seqlen > 0\n1043\t                else None\n1044\t            )\n1045\t        else:\n1046\t            mamba_branching_seqlen = None\n1047\t\n1048\t        # Copy mamba state to req local space if cow is true\n1049\t        if cow_mamba and last_node.mamba_value is not None:\n1050\t            # for reqs without mamba cache\n1051\t            if req.mamba_pool_idx is None:\n1052\t                dst_index = self.req_to_token_pool.mamba_pool.alloc(1)\n1053\t                # try to alloc again, protect last_node from eviction\n1054\t                if dst_index is None:\n1055\t MambaPool:\n191\t    @dataclass(frozen=True, kw_only=True)\n192\t    class State:\n193\t        conv: List[torch.Tensor]\n194\t        temporal: torch.Tensor\n195\t\n196\t        def buffers, excluding intermediate buffers\n395\t        used for speculative decoding (intermediate_ssm, intermediate_conv_window).\n396\t        \"\"\"\n397\t        state_tensors = []\n398\t        for field in vars(self.mamba_cache):\n399\t            # Skip intermediate buffers used only for speculative decoding\n400\t            # These buffers have different size (spec_state_size + 1) and should not be transferred\n401\t            if field in (\"intermediate_ssm\", \"intermediate_conv_window\"):\n402\t                continue\n403\t            value = getattr(self.mamba_cache, field)\n404\t            if isinstance(value, list):\n405\t                state_tensors.extend(value)\n406\t            else:\n407\t                state_tensors.append(value)\n408\t        data_ptrs, data_lens, item_lens = [], [], []\n409\t\n410\t        for _, state_tensor in enumerate(state_tensors):\n411\t            data_ptrs += [\n412\t                state_tensor[i].data_ptr() for   state_tensor[i][0].nbytes for i in range(self.num_mamba_layers)\n417\t            ]\n418\t        return data_ptrs, data_lens, item_lens\n419\t\n420\t    def get_state_dim_per_tensor(self):\n421\t        \"\"\"Get the sliceable dimension size for each state tensor.\n422\t\n423\t        For mamba state, the layout is:\n424\t        - conv_state: [num_layers, size+1, conv_dim/tp, conv_kernel-1]\n425\t        - temporal_state: [num_layers, size+1, num_heads/tp, head_dim, state_size]\n426\t\n427\t        The 3rd dimension (index 2) is the one that gets sliced by TP.\n428\t        Returns the size of this dimension for each tensor (repeated for each layer).\n429\t        \"\"\"\n430\t        state_tensors = []\n431\t        for field in vars(self.mamba_cache):\n432\t have per-layer data_ptrs\n444\t            dim_per_tensor += [sliceable_dim] * self.num_mamba_layers\n445\t        return dim_per_tensor\n446\t\n447\t\n448\tclass def free_mamba_cache(\n596\t        self, req: \"Req\", mamba_ping_pong_track_buffer_to_keep: Optional[int] = None\n597\t    ):\n598\t        mamba_index = req.mamba_pool_idx\n599\t        assert    )\n607\t            if mamba_ping_pong_track_buffer_to_keep is not None:\n608\t                assert mamba_ping_pong_track_buffer_to_keep in [\n609\t                    0,\n610\t tensor.\n613\t                # The ping-pong buffer size is either 2 (normal) or 1 (spec decode).\n614\t                if self.mamba_ping_pong_track_buffer_size == 2:\n615\t                        idx_to_free : idx_to_free + 1\n619\t                        ]\n620\t                    )\n621\t                else:\n622\t                    assert \"\"\"Common logging and mem_usage computation for KV cache allocation.\n688\t        Supports both tuple (K, V) size returns and single KV size returns.\n689\t        \"\"\"\n690\t strides,\n2080\t    tgt_loc_ptr,\n2081\t    src_loc_ptr,\n2082\t    num_locs,\n2083\t    num_locs_upper: tl.constexpr,\n2084\t    BYTES_PER_TILE: tl.constexpr,\n2085\t):\n2086\t    \"\"\"2D tiled      num_tokens_per_dp=num_tokens_per_dp,\n616\t        )\n617\t\n618\t    def merge_mm_inputs(self) -> Optional[MultimodalInputs]:\n619\t        \"\"\"\n620\t        Merge all multimodal inputs in            column_starts, req_lens = self.extend_prefix_lens, self.extend_seq_lens\n679\t        self.ngram_embedding_info = NgramEmbeddingInfo.create(\n680\t            batch.ne_token_table,\n681\t            self.batch_size,\n682\t            device,\n683\t            column_starts=column_starts,\n684\t            req_lens=req_lens,\n685\t        )\n686\t\n687\t    def _compute_spec_mrope_positions(\n688\t        self, model_runner: ModelRunner, batch: ModelWorkerBatch\n689\t    ):\n690\t        # TODO support batched deltas\n691\t        batch_size = self.seq_lens.shape[0]\n692\t        device = model_runner.device\n693\t        mm_inputs = batch.multimodal_inputs\n694\t\n695\t        if batch.forward_mode.is_draft_extend():  # draft_extend_after_decode\n696\t            mrope_deltas = []\n697\t            extend_lens = []\n698\t            for batch_idx in range(batch_size):\n699\t                extend_seq_len = batch.extend_seq_lens[batch_idx]\n700\t                extend_lens.append(extend_seq_len)\n701\t                mrope_delta = (\n702\t                    torch.zeros(1, dtype=torch.int64)\n703\t                    if mm_inputs[batch_idx] is None\n704\t                    else mm_inputs[batch_idx].mrope_position_delta.squeeze(0)\n705\t                )\n706\t                mrope_deltas.append(mrope_delta.to(device=device))\n707\t            position_chunks = torch.split(batch.spec_info.positions, extend_lens)\n708\t            mrope_positions_list = [\n709\t                pos_chunk + delta\n710\t                for pos_chunk, delta in zip(position_chunks, mrope_deltas)\n711\t            ]\n712\t            next_input_positions = (\n713\t                torch.cat(mrope_positions_list, dim=0).unsqueeze(0).repeat(3, 1)\n714\t            )\n715\t\n716\t        else:  # target_verify or draft_decode\n717\t            seq_positions = batch.spec_info.positions.view(batch_size, -1)\n718\t            # Split text-only and mixed batches here because SpecV2 text-only batches can avoid an extra D2H.\n719\t            if all(mm_input is None for mm_input in mm_inputs):\n720\t                mrope_delta_tensor = torch.zeros(\n721\t                    (batch_size, 1), dtype=torch.int64, device=device\n722\t                )\n723\t            else:\n724\t                mrope_deltas = [\n725\t                    (\n726\t                        torch.zeros(1, dtype=torch.int64)\n727\t                        if mm_inputs[i] is None\n728\t                        else mm_inputs[i].mrope_position_delta.squeeze(0)\n729\t                    )\n730\t                    for i in range(batch_size)\n731\t                ]\n732\t                mrope_delta_tensor = torch.stack(mrope_deltas, dim=0).to(device=device)\n733\t            next_input_positions = (\n734\t                (seq_positions + mrope_delta_tensor).flatten().unsqueeze(0).repeat(3, 1)\n735\t            )\n736\t\n737\t        self.mrope_positions = next_input_positions\n738\t\n739\t    def _expand_mrope_from_input(\n740\t        self,\n741\t        mm_input: MultimodalInputs,\n742\t        seq_len: int,\n743\t    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n744\t        # doing below compute on cpu to avoid frequent small kernels\n745\t        if mm_input.mrope_position_delta_repeated_cache is None:\n746\t            mm_input.mrope_position_delta_repeated_cache = (\n747\t                (mm_input.mrope_position_delta - 1).flatten().unsqueeze(0).repeat(3, 1)\n748\t            )\n749\t        mrope_positions = mm_input.mrope_position_delta_repeated_cache + seq_len\n750\t        return mrope_positions\n751\t\n752\t    def _compute_mrope_positions(\n753\t        self, model_runner: ModelRunner, batch: ModelWorkerBatch\n754\t    ):\n755\t        # batch_size * [3 * seq_len]\n756\t        batch_size = self.seq_lens_cpu.shape[0]\n757\t        mrope_positions_list = [[]] * batch_size\n758\t        for batch_idx in range(batch_size):\n759\t            mm_input = batch.multimodal_inputs[batch_idx]\n760\t            if self.forward_mode.is_decode():\n761\t                # 3 * N\n762\t                if (\n763\t                    mm_input is None\n764\t                    or get_global_server_args().rl_on_policy_target is not None\n765\t                ):\n766\t                    mrope_positions_list[batch_idx] = torch.full(\n767\t                        (3, 1),\n768\t                        self.seq_lens_cpu[batch_idx] - 1,\n769\t                        dtype=torch.int64,\n770\t                    )\n771\t                else:\n772\t                    mrope_positions = self._expand_mrope_from_input(\n773\t                        mm_input, self.seq_lens_cpu[batch_idx]\n774\t                    )\n775\t                    mrope_positions_list[batch_idx] = mrope_positions\n776\t            elif self.forward_mode.is_extend(include_draft_extend_v2=True):\n777\t                extend_seq_len, extend_prefix_len = (\n778\t                    batch.extend_seq_lens[batch_idx],\n779\t                    batch.extend_prefix_lens[batch_idx],\n780\t                )\n781\t                if (\n782\t                    mm_input is None\n783\t                    or get_global_server_args().rl_on_policy_target is not None\n784\t                ):\n785\t                    # text only\n786\t                    mrope_positions = torch.tensor(\n787\t                        [\n788\t                            [\n789\t                                pos\n790\t                                for pos in range(\n791\t                                    extend_prefix_len,\n792\t                                    extend_prefix_len + extend_seq_len,\n793\t                                )\n794\t                            ]\n795\t                        ]\n796\t                        * 3\n797\t                    )\n798\t                else:\n799\t                    mrope_positions = mm_input.mrope_positions[\n800\t                        :,\n801\t                        extend_prefix_len : extend_prefix_len + extend_seq_len,\n802\t                    ]\n803\t                    if mrope_positions.numel() == 0:\n804\t                        mrope_positions = self._expand_mrope_from_input(\n805\t                            mm_input, self.seq_lens_cpu[batch_idx]\n806\t                        )\n807\t                mrope_positions_list[batch_idx] = mrope_positions\n808\t\n809\t        self.mrope_positions = torch.cat(\n810\t            [pos for pos in mrope_positions_list],\n811\t            dim=1,\n812\t        ).to(dtype=torch.int64, device=model_runner.device, non_blocking=True)\n813\t\n814\t    def _pad_tensor_to_size(self, tensor: torch.Tensor, size: int, *, value: int = 0):\n815\t        if value == 0:\n816\t            return torch.cat(\n817\t                [tensor, tensor.new_zeros(size - tensor.shape[0], *tensor.shape[1:])],\n818\t                dim=0,\n819\t            )\n820\t        else:\n821\t            return torch.cat(\n822\t                [\n823\t                    tensor,\n824\t                    tensor.new_full((size - tensor.shape[0], *tensor.shape[1:]), value),\n825\t                ],\n826\t                dim=0,\n827\t            )\n828\t\n829\t    def prepare_mlp_sync_batch(self, model_runner: ModelRunner):\n830\t        from sglang.srt.batch_overlap.two_batch_overlap import TboForwardBatchPreparer\n831\t\n832\t        assert self.global_num_tokens_cpu is not None\n833\t        assert self.global_num_tokens_for_logprob_cpu is not None\n834\t\n835\t        global_num_tokens = self.global_num_tokens_cpu\n836\t        sync_group_size = len(global_num_tokens)\n837\t        attn_tp_size = get_attention_tp_size()\n838\t\n839\t        for i in range(sync_group_size):\n840\t            # make sure that the padded length is divisible by attn_tp_size because we may need reduce-scatter across attn_tp dim.\n841\t            # there is no reduce-scatter in LM logprob, so we do not need to adjust the padded length for logprob\n842\t            global_num_tokens[i] = ceil_align(global_num_tokens[i], attn_tp_size)\n843\t\n844\t        # make sure that each rank has the same number of tokens to do collective communication.\n845\t        attn_cp_size = get_attention_cp_size()\n846\t        for i in range(sync_group_size):\n847\t            global_num_tokens[i] = ceil_align(global_num_tokens[i], attn_cp_size)\n848\t\n849\t        dp_padding_mode = DpPaddingMode.get_dp_padding_mode(\n850\t            self.is_extend_in_batch, global_num_tokens\n851\t        )\n852\t        self.dp_padding_mode = dp_padding_mode\n853\t\n854\t        if dp_padding_mode.is_max_len():\n855\t            # when DP gather mode is all gather, we will use\n856\t            # all_gather_into_tensor to gather hidden states, where transferred\n857\t            # tokens should be padded to the same length. We will also use\n858\t            # reduce-scatter instead of all-reduce after MLP.\n859\t            max_num_tokens = max(global_num_tokens)\n860\t            global_num_tokens = [max_num_tokens] * sync_group_size\n861\t            buffer_len = max_num_tokens * sync_group_size\n862\t        else:\n863\t            buffer_len = sum(global_num_tokens)\n864\t\n865\t        if len(global_num_tokens) > 1:\n866\t            num_tokens = global_num_tokens[get_attention_dp_rank()]\n867\t        else:\n868\t            num_tokens = global_num_tokens[0]\n869\t\n870\t        self.global_dp_buffer_len = buffer_len\n871\t        set_dp_buffer_len(\n872\t            buffer_len, num_tokens, dp_padding_mode.is_max_len(), global_num_tokens\n873\t        )\n874\t        set_is_extend_in_batch(self.is_extend_in_batch)\n875\t\n876\t        bs = self.batch_size\n877\t\n878\t        if (\n879\t            self.forward_mode.is_decode()\n880\t            or self.forward_mode.is_target_verify()\n881\t            or self.forward_mode.is_draft_extend(include_v2=True)\n882\t            or self.forward_mode.is_idle()\n883\t        ):\n884\t            if self.is_extend_in_batch and dp_padding_mode.is_max_len():\n885\t                setattr(self, \"_original_forward_mode\", self.forward_mode)\n886\t                self.forward_mode = ForwardMode.EXTEND\n887\t                self.extend_num_tokens = bs\n888\t                self.extend_seq_lens = torch.full_like(self.seq_lens, 1)\n889\t                self.extend_prefix_lens = self.seq_lens - 1\n890\t                self.extend_start_loc = torch.arange(\n891\t                    bs, dtype=torch.int32, device=self.seq_lens.device\n892\t                )\n893\t                self.extend_prefix_lens_cpu = self.extend_prefix_lens.cpu()\n894\t                self.extend_seq_lens_cpu = self.extend_seq_lens.cpu()\n895\t                self.extend_logprob_start_lens_cpu = self.extend_prefix_lens_cpu\n896\t            else:\n897\t                setattr(self, \"_original_batch_size\", self.batch_size)\n898\t                if self.spec_info is not None:\n899\t                    bs = self.batch_size = (\n900\t                        num_tokens // self.spec_info.num_tokens_per_req\n901\t                    )\n902\t                else:\n903\t                    bs = self.batch_size = num_tokens\n904\t        elif self.forward_mode.is_extend():\n905\t            self.extend_num_tokens = num_tokens\n906\t\n907\t        # padding\n908\t        self._pad_inputs_to_size(model_runner, num_tokens, bs)\n909\t        self.global_num_tokens_cpu = global_num_tokens\n910\t        global_num_tokens_pinned = torch.tensor(global_num_tokens, pin_memory=True)\n911\t        self.global_num_tokens_gpu.copy_(global_num_tokens_pinned, non_blocking=True)\n912\t\n913\t        TboForwardBatchPreparer.prepare(\n914\t            batch=self, is_draft_worker=model_runner.is_draft_worker\n915\t        )\n916\t        # TODO: The following is added to make sure sub-batch input_ids are padded\n917\t        # to the multiple of attn_tp_size. It can likely be removed after this\n918\t        # function is refactored and merged into the Scheduler.\n919\t        if self.tbo_children:\n920\t            for child in self.tbo_children:\n921\t {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01QeMVkqBdMpK9N8ac4T4ndo","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# Copyright 2025 SGLang Team\n2\t# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n3\t# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n4\t# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n5\t#\n6\t#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n7\t#\n8\t# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n9\t# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n10\t# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n11\t# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n12\t# limitations under the License.\n13\t# ==============================================================================\n14\t# Adapted from https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/2c58742dff8613a3bd7496f2008ce927e18d38d1/vllm/model_executor/layers/mamba/mamba2_metadata.py\n15\t\n16\t\n17\timport math\n18\tfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n19\tfrom typing import Optional\n20\t\n21\timport torch\n22\t\n23\tfrom sglang.srt.model_executor.forward_batch_info import ForwardBatch\n24\t\n25\t\n26\t@dataclass(kw_only=True)\n27\tclass ForwardMetadata:\n28\t    query_start_loc: torch.Tensor\n29\t    mamba_cache_indices: torch.Tensor\n30\t    # For topk > 1 eagle\n31\t    retrieve_next_token: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n32\t    retrieve_next_sibling: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n33\t    retrieve_parent_token: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n34\t    # For prefill radix cache\n35\t    track_conv_indices: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n36\t    track_ssm_h_src: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n37\t    track_ssm_h_dst: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n38\t    track_ssm_final_src: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n39\t    track_ssm_final_dst: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n40\t\n41\t    is_target_verify: bool = False\n42\t    draft_token_num: int = 1\n43\t\n44\t\n45\t@dataclass(kw_only=True)\n46\tclass Mamba2Metadata(ForwardMetadata):\n47\t    \"\"\"stable metadata across all mamba2 layers in the forward pass\"\"\"\n48\t\n49\t    num_prefills: int\n50\t    num_prefill_tokens: int\n51\t    num_decodes: int\n52\t\n53\t    @dataclass(kw_only=True, frozen=True)\n54\t    class MixedMetadata:\n55\t        has_initial_states: torch.Tensor\n56\t        prep_initial_states: bool\n57\t\n58\t        chunk_size: int\n59\t        seq_idx: torch.Tensor\n60\t        chunk_indices: torch.Tensor\n61\t        chunk_offsets: torch.Tensor\n62\t\n63\t        extend_seq_lens_cpu: list[int]\n64\t\n65\t    mixed_metadata: MixedMetadata | None = None\n66\t    \"\"\"`mixed_metadata` is used for extend/mixed requests\"\"\"\n67\t\n68\t    @staticmethod\n69\t    def _query_start_loc_to_chunk_indices_offsets(\n70\t        query_start_loc: torch.Tensor, chunk_size: int, total_seqlens: int\n71\t    ) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n72\t        \"\"\"\n73\t        Args:\n74\t            query_start_loc (torch.Tensor): 1D tensor of cumulative sequence\n75\t                lengths, shape (num_seqs + 1,).\n76\t                The first element should be 0. Each entry represents the starting\n77\t                index of a sequence in the flattened token array.\n78\t            chunk_size (int): The size of each physical mamba chunk\n79\t                (number of tokens per chunk).\n80\t            total_seqlens (int): The total number of tokens in the batch.\n81\t\n82\t        Returns:\n83\t            Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]: A tuple containing:\n84\t                - chunk_indices (torch.Tensor): 1D tensor of indices\n85\t                    indicating the physical chunk for each logical chunk.\n86\t                - chunk_offsets (torch.Tensor): 1D tensor of offsets\n87\t                    indicating the starting index of each logical chunk within\n88\t                    its physical chunk.\n89\t\n90\t        This function computes the chunk indices and offsets for the given\n91\t        query_start_loc and chunk_size. Both are tensors of integers with length N,\n92\t        where N is the number of logical (pseudo) chunks.\n93\t        A logical chunk is a sequence of tokens that are all part of the same\n94\t        sequence and are all in the same physical mamba chunk.\n95\t        In other words, a logical chunk changes every time we cross a sequence\n96\t        boundary or a physical mamba chunk boundary.\n97\t        Logical chunks are needed to handle batched requests with initial states\n98\t        (see _state_passing_fwd and _chunk_scan_fwd).\n99\t        The chunk_indices tensor contains the index of the physical chunk for each\n100\t        logical chunk.\n101\t        The chunk_offsets tensor contains the offset (AKA starting index) of the\n102\t        logical chunk in the physical chunk.\n103\t\n104\t        Example:\n105\t        query_start_loc = [0, 5, 10]\n106\t        chunk_size = 8\n107\t        total_seqlens = 10\n108\t        -> chunk_indices = [0, 0, 1]\n109\t        -> chunk_offsets = [0, 5, 0]\n110\t\n111\t        In this example, we have 2 sequences, each with 5 tokens. The physical\n112\t        chunk size is 8 tokens.\n113\t        We have three logical chunks:\n114\t        - the first logical chunk starts at token 0 in the first physical chunk\n115\t            and contains all 5 tokens from the first sequence\n116\t        - the second logical chunk starts at token 5 in the first physical chunk\n117\t            and contains first 3 tokens from the second sequence\n118\t        - the third logical chunk starts at token 0 in the second physical chunk\n119\t            and contains the remaining 2 tokens from the second sequence\n120\t        \"\"\"\n121\t\n122\t        cu_seqlens = query_start_loc[1:]  # remove prepended 0\n123\t\n124\t        # outputs will have length expansion of chunks that do not divide\n125\t        # chunk_size\n126\t        N = (\n127\t            math.ceil(total_seqlens / chunk_size)\n128\t            + (cu_seqlens[:-1] % chunk_size > 0).sum()\n129\t        )\n130\t        chunk_indices = torch.arange(N, dtype=torch.int, device=query_start_loc.device)\n131\t        chunk_offsets = torch.zeros(\n132\t            (N,), dtype=torch.int, device=query_start_loc.device\n133\t        )\n134\t\n135\t        p = 0  # num of insertions\n136\t        for s, e in zip(cu_seqlens[:-1], cu_seqlens[1:]):\n137\t\n138\t            # if does not divide chunk_size, then there is one chunk insertion\n139\t            p += s % chunk_size > 0\n140\t\n141\t            # get the dimensions\n142\t            # - the + 1 for _e is to shift the boundary by one chunk\n143\t            # - this shifting is not needed if chunk_size divides e\n144\t            _s, _e = s // chunk_size + p, e // chunk_size + p + (e % chunk_size > 0)\n145\t\n146\t            # adjust indices and offsets\n147\t            chunk_indices[_s:_e] -= p\n148\t            chunk_offsets[_s] = s % chunk_size\n149\t\n150\t        return chunk_indices, chunk_offsets\n151\t\n152\t    @staticmethod\n153\t    def causal_conv1d_update_npu as causal_conv1d_update,\n51\t    )\n52\t\n53\tLoaderFunction = Callable[[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor], None]\n54\t\n55\t\n56\tdef mamba_v2_sharded_weight_loader(\n57\t    shard_spec: List[Tuple[int, int, float]],\n58\t    tp_size: int,\n59\t    tp_rank: int,\n60\t) -> LoaderFunction:\n61\t    \"\"\"Create a weight loader for mamba v2. This ensures that the projections\n62\t    are correctly sharded so that they can be split into x, B, C. It also\n63\t    ensures that all the groups corresponding to a head shard is placed\n64\t    together with it.\n65\t    \"\"\"\n66\t\n67\t    def loader(param: torch.Tensor, loaded_weight: torch.Tensor) -> None:\n68\t\n69\t        # - track boundary of (sharded) param, and loaded_weight, respectively\n70\t        boundary, loaded_boundary = 0, 0\n71\t\n72\t        # Calculate padding size for CPU when TP odd size\n73\t        if is_cpu():\n74\t            full_dim_sum = 0\n75\t            full_dim_list = []\n76\t            weight_full_dim_list = []\n77\t            for full_dim, _, _ in shard_spec:\n78\t                full_dim_sum = full_dim_sum + full_dim\n79\t                full_dim_list.append(full_dim)\n80\t            for full_dim in full_dim_list:\n81\t                weight_full_dim_list.append(\n82\t                    int(full_dim / full_dim_sum * loaded_weight.size(0))\n83\t                )\n84\t\n85\t        # - iterate over the shard specs\n86\t        for full_dim, extra, duplicate_groups in shard_spec:\n87\t            # - full dim is the model dim (before TP).\n88\t            # - extra > 0, means there is expected overall increase\n89\t            #   of dimensions. This is so because of replication.\n90\t            # - ratio is used map the tp_rank to the actual shard\n91\t            #   rank. This is useful when there is replication of\n92\t            #   groups to accompany head shards.\n93\t\n94\t            # - size of the loaded shard\n95\t            shard_size = full_dim // tp_size\n96\t\n97\t            # - compute the rank into the loaded shard.\n98\t            # - if there is replication, different TP shards will\n99\t            #   take from the same rank.\n100\t            # NOTE: currently we only support duplication\n101\t            # in the case where num_groups == 1\n102\t            rank = 0 if duplicate_groups else tp_rank\n103\t\n104\t            # - leftmost boundary index into loaded weight.\n105\t            loaded_skip = rank * shard_size\n106\t            loaded_start_idx = loaded_boundary + loaded_skip\n107\t\n108\t            # - take these many dims from the loaded weight.\n109\t            take = min(shard_size, full_dim - extra - loaded_skip)\n110\t\n111\t            # CPU logic of padding size for qwen3-next\n112\t            # TODO : make this common for all mamba.\n113\t            if is_cpu() and loaded_weight.size(0) % tp_size != 0:\n114\t                import copy\n115\t\n116\t                loaded_weight_ = copy.deepcopy(loaded_weight)\n117\t                q, k, v = torch.split(\n118\t                    loaded_weight_,\n119\t                    weight_full_dim_list,\n120\t                    dim=0,\n121\t                )\n122\t                pad_qk = torch.zeros(\n123\t                    full_dim_list[0] - weight_full_dim_list[0],\n124\t                    loaded_weight.size(1),\n125\t                    loaded_weight.size(2),\n126\t                ).to(loaded_weight.dtype)\n127\t                pad_v = torch.zeros(\n128\t                    full_dim_list[2] - weight_full_dim_list[2],\n129\t                    loaded_weight.size(1),\n130\t                    loaded_weight.size(2),\n131\t                ).to(loaded_weight.dtype)\n132\t                q = torch.cat((q, pad_qk), dim=0)\n133\t                k = torch.cat((k, pad_qk), dim=0)\n134\t                v = torch.cat((v, pad_v), dim=0)\n135\t                loaded_weight_qk = torch.cat((q, k), dim=0)\n136\t                loaded_weight = torch.cat((loaded_weight_qk, v), dim=0)\n137\t\n138\t            # - always shard on dim 0\n139\t            # - the ignore is for a mundane mypy error as it does not\n140\t            #   seem to handle slices well.\n141\t            # https://github.com/python/mypy/issues/2410\n142\t            param.data[\n143\t                boundary : (boundary + take), ...  # type: ignore[misc]\n144\t            ] = loaded_weight[\n145\t                loaded_start_idx : (loaded_start_idx + take)  # type: ignore[misc]\n146\t            ]  # type: ignore[misc]\n147\t\n148\t            # move indexing boundaries\n149\t            boundary += shard_size\n150\t            loaded_boundary += full_dim - extra\n151\t\n152\t    return loader\n153\t\n154\t\n155\tclass MambaMixer2(torch.nn.Module):\n156\t    \"\"\"\n157\t    Compute ∆, A, B, C, and D the state space parameters and compute\n158\t    the `contextualized_states`. A, D are input independent\n159\t    (see Mamba paper [1] Section 3.5.2 \"Interpretation of A\"\n160\t    for why A isn't selective) ∆, B, C are input-dependent\n161\t    (this is a key difference between Mamba and the linear time\n162\t    invariant S4, and is why Mamba is called\n163\t    **selective** state spaces)\n164\t    \"\"\"\n165\t\n166\t    def __init__(\n167\t        self,\n168\t        cache_params: Mamba2CacheParams,\n169\t        hidden_size: int,\n170\t        use_conv_bias: bool,\n171\t        use_bias: bool,\n172\t        n_groups: int = 1,\n173\t        rms_norm_eps: float = 1e-5,\n174\t        activation: str = \"silu\",\n175\t        use_rms_norm: bool = True,\n176\t        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,\n177\t        prefix: str = \"\",\n178\t    ):\n179\t        super().__init__()\n180\t\n181\t        # For TP, the sharding plan is as follows:\n182\t        # - for the conv modules, since\n183\t        #   conv_dim = intermediate_size * 2 * n_groups * ssm_state_size,\n184\t        #   we shard intermediate_size and n_groups\n185\t        # - since intermediate_size = n_heads * head_dim, sharding on\n186\t        #   intermediate_size is achieved by sharding on n_heads.\n187\t        # - IF, world_size divides groups, then sharding\n188\t        #   (n_groups / world_size, n_heads / world_size)\n189\t        #   also maintains the invariant n_heads % n_groups == 0\n190\t        # - HOWEVER IF, world_size DOES NOT divide groups, then we need\n191\t        #   to allocate extra space in the shard, such that groups\n192\t        #   may be replicated to follow the head shard.\n193\t        # - NOTE: currently for the world size DOES NOT divide groups\n194\t        #   case, we only support the case when n_groups == 1\n195\t        self.tp_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size()\n196\t        self.tp_rank = get_tensor_model_parallel_rank()\n197\t\n198\t        self.num_heads = num_heads = cache_params.shape.num_heads\n199\t        self.head_dim = cache_params.shape.head_dim\n200\t\n201\t        assert (\n202\t            num_heads % self.tp_size == 0\n203\t        ), \"Tensor parallel world size must divide num heads.\"\n204\t\n205\t        assert (n_groups % self.tp_size) == 0 or n_groups == 1, (\n206\t            \"If tensor parallel world size does not divide num_groups, \"\n207\t            \"then num_groups must equal 1.\"\n208\t        )\n209\t\n210\t        assert (\n211\t            (n_groups % self.tp_size == 0) or self.tp_size == 1 or quant_config is None\n212\t        ), (\n213\t            \"Tensor parallel currently supported for quantized models only \"\n214\t            \"if tensor parallel world size divides num groups.\"\n215\t        )\n216\t\n217\t        self.ssm_state_size = cache_params.shape.ssm_state_size\n218\t        self.activation = activation\n219\t\n220\t        conv_kernel_size = cache_params.shape.conv_kernel\n221\t        self.intermediate_size = intermediate_size = (\n222\t            cache_params.shape.intermediate_size\n223\t        )\n224\t        self.n_groups = n_groups\n225\t        if n_groups % self.tp_size != 0:\n226\t            # - for TP we shard conv_dim by sharding on n_groups,\n227\t            # - but if n_groups cannot divide tp_size, we need to\n228\t            #   extend some extra groups\n229\t            groups = extra_groups_for_head_shards(n_groups, self.tp_size)\n230\t            self.n_groups = n_groups + groups\n231\t        self.groups_ssm_state_size = self.n_groups * self.ssm_state_size\n232\t        self.conv_dim = cache_params.shape.conv_dim\n233\t\n234\t        if n_groups % self.tp_size == 0:\n235\t            self.conv1d = MergedColumnParallelLinear(\n236\t                input_size=conv_kernel_size,\n237\t                output_sizes=[\n238\t                    intermediate_size,\n239\t                    self.groups_ssm_state_size,\n240\t                    self.groups_ssm_state_size,\n241\t                ],\n242\t                bias=use_conv_bias,\n243\t                quant_config=None,\n244\t                prefix=f\"{prefix}.conv1d\",\n245\t            )\n246\t\n247\t            self.in_proj = MergedColumnParallelLinear(\n248\t                input_size=hidden_size,\n249\t                output_sizes=[\n250\t                    intermediate_size,\n251\t                    intermediate_size,\n252\t                    self.groups_ssm_state_size,\n253\t                    self.groups_ssm_state_size,\n254\t                    self.num_heads,\n255\t                ],\n256\t                bias=use_bias,\n257\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n258\t                prefix=f\"{prefix}.in_proj\",\n259\t            )\n260\t        else:\n261\t            # This is the n_groups == 1 case,\n262\t            # where we need to duplicate groups if TP>1.\n263\t\n264\t            self.conv1d = ColumnParallelLinear(\n265\t                input_size=conv_kernel_size,\n266\t                output_size=self.conv_dim,\n267\t                bias=use_conv_bias,\n268\t                quant_config=None,\n269\t                prefix=f\"{prefix}.conv1d\",\n270\t            )\n271\t\n272\t            self.in_proj = ColumnParallelLinear(\n273\t                input_size=hidden_size,\n274\t                output_size=intermediate_size + self.conv_dim + self.num_heads,\n275\t                bias=use_bias,\n276\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n277\t                prefix=f\"{prefix}.in_proj\",\n278\t            )\n279\t\n280\t            # - because in_proj is a concatenation of 3 weights, we\n281\t            #   need to interleave them before sharding\n282\t            # - use the custom weight loader mamba_v2_sharded_weight_loader\n283\t            #   for conv1d.bias, covn1d.weight and in_proj.weight\n284\t            # - need to set these settings, to assign the groups\n285\t            #   to the head shards\n286\t            group_shard_settings = (\n287\t                self.groups_ssm_state_size,  # expected model size\n288\t                (self.n_groups - n_groups) * self.ssm_state_size,  # extra dims assigned\n289\t                n_groups == 1,  # if there was only one group\n290\t            )\n291\t            intermediate_settings = (intermediate_size, 0, False)\n292\t            head_settings = (self.num_heads, 0, False)\n293\t\n294\t            # - the weight already has a \"weight_loader\" attribute\n295\t            #   which set_weight_attrs will raise if we do not\n296\t            #   delete before trying to override it\n297\t            # - ditto for the other two weights below\n298\t            delattr(self.conv1d.bias, \"weight_loader\")\n299\t            set_weight_attrs(\n300\t                self.conv1d.bias,\n301\t                {\n302\t                    \"weight_loader\": mamba_v2_sharded_weight_loader(\n303\t                        [\n304\t                            intermediate_settings,\n305\t                            group_shard_settings,\n306\t                            group_shard_settings,\n307\t                        ],\n308\t                        self.tp_size,\n309\t                        self.tp_rank,\n310\t                    )\n311\t                },\n312\t            )\n313\t\n314\t            delattr(self.conv1d.weight, \"weight_loader\")\n315\t            set_weight_attrs(\n316\t                self.conv1d.weight,\n317\t                {\n318\t                    \"weight_loader\": mamba_v2_sharded_weight_loader(\n319\t                        [\n320\t                            intermediate_settings,\n321\t                            group_shard_settings,\n322\t                            group_shard_settings,\n323\t                        ],\n324\t                        self.tp_size,\n325\t                        self.tp_rank,\n326\t                    )\n327\t                },\n328\t            )\n329\t\n330\t            if quant_config is None:\n331\t                # - quant layers do not have a weight loader\n332\t                delattr(self.in_proj.weight, \"weight_loader\")\n333\t                set_weight_attrs(\n334\t                    self.in_proj.weight,\n335\t                    {\n336\t                        \"weight_loader\": mamba_v2_sharded_weight_loader(\n337\t                            [\n338\t                                intermediate_settings,  # for gate\n339\t                                intermediate_settings,\n340\t                                group_shard_settings,\n341\t                                group_shard_settings,\n342\t                                head_settings,  # for dt\n343\t                            ],\n344\t                            self.tp_size,\n345\t                            self.tp_rank,\n346\t                        )\n347\t                    },\n348\t                )\n349\t\n350\t        # unsqueeze to fit conv1d weights shape into the linear weights shape.\n351\t        # Can't do this in `weight_loader` since it already exists in\n352\t        # `ColumnParallelLinear` and `MergedColumnParallelLinear`,\n353\t        # and `set_weight_attrs` doesn't allow to override it\n354\t        self.conv1d.weight.data = self.conv1d.weight.data.unsqueeze(1)\n355\t\n356\t        # - these are TPed by heads to reduce the size of the\n357\t        #   temporal shape\n358\t        self.A = nn.Parameter(\n359\t            torch.empty(\n360\t                divide(num_heads, self.tp_size),\n361\t                dtype=torch.float32,\n362\t            )\n363\t        )\n364\t        self.D = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(num_heads // self.tp_size))\n365\t        self.dt_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(num_heads // self.tp_size))\n366\t        self.use_rms_norm = use_rms_norm\n367\t\n368\t        set_weight_attrs(self.D, {\"weight_loader\": sharded_weight_loader(0)})\n369\t        a_weight_loader = composed_weight_loader(\n370\t            sharded_weight_loader(0), lambda x: -torch.exp(x.float())\n371\t        )\n372\t        set_weight_attrs(self.A, {\"weight_loader\": a_weight_loader})\n373\t        set_weight_attrs(self.dt_bias, {\"weight_loader\": sharded_weight_loader(0)})\n374\t\n375\t        self.out_proj = RowParallelLinear(\n376\t            intermediate_size,\n377\t            hidden_size,\n378\t            bias=use_bias,\n379\t            input_is_parallel=True,\n380\t            quant_config=quant_config,\n381\t            prefix=f\"{prefix}.out_proj\",\n382\t        )\n383\t\n384\t        self.norm = Mixer2RMSNormGated(\n385\t            intermediate_size, n_groups, self.use_rms_norm, eps=rms_norm_eps\n386\t        )\n387\t\n388\t        self.prefix = prefix\n389\t\n390\t    def forward(\n391\t        self,\n392\t        *,\n393\t        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,\n394\t        output: torch.Tensor,\n395\t        layer_cache: MambaPool.State,\n396\t        metadata: Mamba2Metadata,\n397\t        mup_vector: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n398\t        use_triton_causal_conv: bool = False,\n399\t    ):\n400\t        # stay the same and reused for all mamba layers in the same iteration\n404\t        state_indices_tensor = metadata.mamba_cache_indices\n405\t        conv_state = layer_cache.conv[0]\n406\t        ssm_state = layer_cache.temporal\n407\t\n408\t        query_start_loc = metadata.query_start_loc\n409\t\n410\t        # 1. Gated MLP's linear projection\n411\t        projected_states, _ = self.in_proj(hidden_states)\n412\t\n413\t        if mup_vector is not None:\n414\t            projected_states = projected_states * mup_vector\n415\t\n416\t        gate, hidden_states_B_C, dt = torch.split(\n417\t            projected_states,\n418\t            [\n419\t                self.intermediate_size // self.tp_size,\n420\t                self.conv_dim // self.tp_size,\n421\t                self.num_heads // self.tp_size,\n422\t            ],\n423\t            dim=-1,\n424\t        )\n425\t        conv_weights = self.conv1d.weight.view(\n426\t            self.conv1d.weight.size(0), self.conv1d.weight.size(2)\n427\t        )\n428\t\n429\t        # token count\n448\t        has_prefill = num_prefills > 0\n449\t        has_decode = num_decodes > 0\n450\t        num_actual_tokens = num_prefill_tokens + num_decode_tokens\n451\t        assert num_actual_tokens == projected_states.shape[0]\n452\t\n453\t        # NOTE: V0 put prefill before decode\n454\t        # Separate prefill and decode by splitting varlen input\n455\t        # Split along token dimension\n456\t        hidden_states_B_C_p, hidden_states_B_C_d = torch.split(\n457\t            hidden_states_B_C,\n458\t            [num_prefill_tokens, num_decode_tokens],\n459\t            dim=0,\n460\t        )\n461\t        dt_p, dt_d = torch.split(\n462\t            dt,\n463\t            [num_prefill_tokens, num_decode_tokens],\n464\t            dim=0,\n465\t        )\n466\t        # sglang.srt.model_executor.model_runner import ModelRunner\n42\t\n43\t\n44\t@dataclass\n45\tclass MemoryPoolConfig:\n46\t    \"\"\"Resolved memory pool config, shared between target and draft workers.\"\"\"\n47\t\n48\t    max_total_num_tokens: int\n49\t    max_running_requests: int\n50\t    full_max_total_num_tokens: Optional[int] = None\n51\t    swa_max_total_num_tokens: Optional[int] = int) -> int:\n76\t        kv_size = torch._utils._element_size(self.kv_cache_dtype)\n77\t        if self.use_mla_backend:\n78\t            cell_size = (\n79\t                (self.model_config.kv_lora_rank + self.model_config.qk_rope_head_dim)\n80\t                * num_layers\n81\t                * kv_size\n82\t            )\n83\t            if is_float4_e2m1fn_x2(self.kv_cache_dtype):\n84\t                # kv_scale_buffer\n85\t                scale_block_size = 16\n86\t                cell_size = (cell_size // 2) + (\n87\t                    (\n88\t                        (\n89\t                            self.model_config.kv_lora_rank\n90\t                            + self.model_config.qk_rope_head_dim\n91\t                        )\n92\t                        // scale_block_size\n93\t                    )\n94\t                    * num_layers\n95\t                    * kv_size\n96\t                )\n97\t\n98\t            # ) * (self.model_config.head_dim + self.model_config.v_head_dim)\n117\t\n118\t                swa_per_token = self.model_config.get_swa_num_kv_heads(\n119\t                    get_attention_tp_size()\n120\t                ) * (self.model_config.swa_head_dim + self.model_config.swa_v_head_dim)\n121\t\n122\t                cell_size = (\n123\t                    full_per_token * full_layers_num + swa_per_token * swa_layers_num\n124\t                ) * kv_size\n125\t            else:\n126\t                cell_size = (\n127\t                    self.model_config.get_num_kv_heads(get_attention_tp_size())\n128\t                    * (self.model_config.head_dim + self.model_config.v_head_dim)\n129\t                    * num_layers\n130\t                    * kv_size\n131\t                )\n132\t\n133\t            if is_float4_e2m1fn_x2(self.kv_cache_dtype):\n134\t                # kv_scale_buffer\n135\t                scale_block_size = + (\n140\t                    (n * k * num_layers * 2 * kv_size) // scale_block_size\n141\t                )\n142\t        return cell_size\n143\t\n144\t    def profile_max_num_token(self: ModelRunner, pre_model_load_memory: int):\n145\t        post_model_load_memory = get_available_gpu_memory(\n146\t            self.device,\n147\t            self.gpu_id,\n148\t            distributed=get_world_group().world_size > 1,\n149\t            cpu_group=get_world_group().cpu_group,\n150\t        )\n151\t\n152\t        # Get the number of layers used for KV cache                self.num_effective_layers,\n158\t            )\n159\t        elif mambaish := self.mambaish_config:\n160\t            effective_layer_ids = [\n161\t                i\n162\t                for i in mambaish.full_attention_layer_ids\n163\t                if self.start_layer <= i < self.end_layer\n164\t            ]\n165\t            num_layers = len(effective_layer_ids)\n166\t        else:\n167\t            num_layers = self.num_effective_layers\n168\t\n169\t        cell_size = self.get_cell_size_per_token(num_layers)\n170\t\n171\t        rest_memory = post_model_load_memory - pre_model_load_memory * (\n172\t            1 - self.mem_fraction_static\n173\t        )\n174\t        if self.mambaish_config is not None:\n175\t            rest_memory =        config = self.mambaish_config\n181\t        server_args = self.server_args\n182\t        assert config is not None\n183\t\n184\t        # reserve the memory for the intermediate mamba states used for spec dec\n185\t        if not self.spec_algorithm.is_none():\n186\t            assert server_args.speculative_num_draft_tokens is not None\n187\t            assert server_args.max_running_requests is not None\n188\t\n189\t            max_running_requests = server_args.max_running_requests // (\n190\t                self.dp_size if server_args.enable_dp_attention else 1\n191\t            )\n192\t            mamba_state_intermediate_size = (\n193\t                config.mamba2_cache_params.mamba_cache_per_req\n194\t                * max_running_requests\n195\t                * server_args.speculative_num_draft_tokens\n196\t            )\n197\t            total_rest_memory = total_rest_memory - (\n198\t                mamba_state_intermediate_size / (1 << 30)\n199\t            )\n200\t\n201\t        if server_args.max_mamba_cache_size is not None:\n202\t            # Use explicitly set max_mamba_cache_size\n203\t            server_args.max_mamba_cache_size = server_args.max_mamba_cache_size // (\n204\t                server_args.dp_size if server_args.enable_dp_attention else 1\n205\t            )\n206\t        elif (\n207\t            server_args.disable_radix_cache\n208\t            and server_args.max_running_requests is not None\n209\t        ):\n210\t            # Use explicitly set max_running_requests when radix cache is disabled\n211\t            server_args.max_mamba_cache_size = server_args.max_running_requests // (\n212\t                server_args.dp_size if server_args.enable_dp_attention else 1\n213\t            )\n214\t        else:\n215\t            # Use ratio-based calculation to auto-fit available memory\n216\t            assert config.mamba2_cache_params.mamba_cache_per_req > 0\n217\t\n218\t            # allocate the memory based on the ratio between mamba state memory vs. full kv cache memory\n219\t            # solve the equations:\n220\t            # 1. mamba_state_memory + full_kv_cache_memory == total_rest_memory\n221\t            # 2. mamba_state_memory / full_kv_cache_memory == server_args.mamba_full_memory_ratio\n222\t            mamba_state_memory_raw = (\n223\t                total_rest_memory\n224\t                * server_args.mamba_full_memory_ratio\n225\t                / (1 + server_args.mamba_full_memory_ratio)\n226\t            )\n227\t            # calculate the max_mamba_cache_size based on the given total mamba memory\n228\t            server_args.max_mamba_cache_size = int(\n229\t                (mamba_state_memory_raw * (1 << 30))\n230\t                // config.mamba2_cache_params.mamba_cache_per_req\n231\t            )\n232\t\n233\t        mamba_state_memory = (\n234\t            server_args.max_mamba_cache_size\n235\t            * config.mamba2_cache_params.mamba_cache_per_req\n236\t            / (1 << 30)\n237\t        )\n238\t        return total_rest_memory - mamba_state_memory\n239\t\n240\t    def calculate_mla_kv_cache_dim(self: ModelRunner) -> int:\n241\t        is_nsa_model = is_deepseek_nsa(self.model_config.hf_config)\n242\t        kv_cache_dtype = self.kv_cache_dtype\n243\t        kv_lora_rank = self.model_config.kv_lora_rank\n244\t        qk_rope_head_dim = self.model_config.qk_rope_head_dim\n245\t        kv_cache_dim = kv_lora_rank + qk_rope_head_dim  # default mla kv cache dim\n246\t\n247\t        # For non-NSA models, MLA kv cache dim is simply kv_lora_rank + qk_rope_head_dim\n248\t        if not is_nsa_model:\n249\t            return kv_cache_dim\n250\t\n251\t        # TRTLLM backend does not override kv_cache_dim for MLA kv cache\n252\t        # Assuming nsa prefill and decode backends are the same when using trtllm MLA backend,\n253\t        # since it is not compatible for trtllm and other mla attn backend due to the different\n254\t        # kv cache layout.\n255\t        if (\n256\t            self.server_args.nsa_prefill_backend == \"trtllm\"\n257\t            or self.server_args.nsa_decode_backend == \"trtllm\"\n258\t        ):\n259\t            return kv_cache_dim\n260\t\n261\t        # On HIP with TileLang backend, keep the default MLA KV cache dimension.\n262\t        # FP8 attention uses the nope(512 fp8) + rope(64 fp8) layout, without extra per-block scales.\n263\t        if _is_hip and (\n264\t            self.server_args.nsa_prefill_backend == \"tilelang\"\n265\t            or self.server_args.nsa_decode_backend == \"tilelang\"\n266\t        ):\n267\t            return kv_cache_dim\n268\t\n269\t        quant_block_size = NSATokenToKVPool.quant_block_size\n270\t        rope_storage_dtype = NSATokenToKVPool.rope_storage_dtype\n271\t        # Calculate override_kv_cache_dim for FP8 storage in backends that use scaled KV layout (excluding TRTLLM and HIP+TileLang).\n272\t        # kv_lora_rank + scale storage (kv_lora_rank // quant_block_size * 4 bytes) + rope dimension storage\n273\t        # Note: rope dimension is stored in original dtype (bf16), not quantized to fp8\n274\t        if kv_cache_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n275\t            assert (\n276\t                kv_lora_rank % quant_block_size == 0\n277\t            ), f\"kv_lora_rank {kv_lora_rank} must be multiple of quant_block_size {quant_block_size}\"\n278\t\n279\t            return (\n280\t                kv_lora_rank\n281\t                + kv_lora_rank // quant_block_size * 4\n282\t                + qk_rope_head_dim * rope_storage_dtype.itemsize\n283\t            )\n284\t\n285\t        return kv_cache_dim\n286\t\n287\t    def _resolve_hybrid_swa_tokens(\n288\t        self: ModelRunner, token_capacity: int\n289\t    ) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:\n290\t        \"\"\"Split token_capacity into full/swa pools.\n291\t\n292\t        Returns (effective_capacity, full_max_total_num_tokens, swa_max_total_num_tokens).\n293\t        \"\"\"\n294\t        page_size = self.server_args.page_size\n295\t\n296\t        assert self.sliding_window_size is not None and self.sliding_window_size > 0\n297\t        full_layers_num = len(self.model_config.full_attention_layer_ids)\n298\t        swa_layers_num = len(self.model_config.swa_attention_layer_ids)\n299\t\n300\t        assert swa_layers_num > 0, \"Hybrid SWA model must have at least one SWA layer\"\n301\t\n302\t        def align_page_size(x: int) -> int:\n303\t            return (x // page_size) * page_size\n304\t\n305\t        if full_layers_num == 0:\n306\t            # all layers are SWA\n307\t            swa_tokens = align_page_size(token_capacity)\n308\t            logger.info(\n309\t                f\"Use sliding window memory pool (all SWA). swa_layer_tokens={swa_tokens}\"\n310\t            )\n311\t            return swa_tokens, 0, swa_tokens\n312\t\n313\t        swa_full_tokens_ratio = self.server_args.swa_full_tokens_ratio\n314\t\n315\t        # Use unified memory-based allocation for all hybrid SWA models.\n316\t        #\n317\t        # Let:\n318\t        #   F = Full layer per-token memory\n319\t        #   S = SWA layer per-token memory (may differ from F)\n320\t        #   r = swa_full_tokens_ratio = swa_tokens / full_tokens\n321\t        #\n322\t        # The profile phase computed:\n323\t        #   cell_size = F * n_full + S * n_swa\n324\t        #   token_capacity = rest_memory / cell_size\n325\t        #   => total_memory = token_capacity * (F * n_full + S * n_swa)\n326\t        #\n327\t        # We need to solve:\n328\t        #   full_tokens * F * n_full + swa_tokens * S * n_swa = total_memory\n329\t        #   swa_tokens = full_tokens * r\n330\t        #\n331\t        # Solution:\n332\t        #   full_tokens = total_memory / (F * n_full + r * S * n_swa)\n333\t        #               = token_capacity * (F * n_full + S * n_swa) / (F * n_full + r * S * n_swa)\n334\t\n335\t        kv_size = torch._utils._element_size(self.kv_cache_dtype)\n336\t\n337\t        # Full layer per-token memory\n338\t        full_per_token = (\n339\t            self.model_config.get_num_kv_heads(get_attention_tp_size())\n340\t            * (self.model_config.head_dim + self.model_config.v_head_dim)\n341\t            * kv_size\n342\t        )\n343\t\n344\t        # SWA layer per-token memory\n345\t        swa_per_token = (\n346\t            self.model_config.get_swa_num_kv_heads(get_attention_tp_size())\n347\t            * (self.model_config.swa_head_dim + self.model_config.swa_v_head_dim)\n348\t            * kv_size\n349\t        )\n350\t\n351\t        # Total memory available from profile\n352\t        total_memory = token_capacity * (\n353\t            full_per_token * full_layers_num + swa_per_token * swa_layers_num\n354\t        )\n355\t\n356\t        # Solve the equations\n357\t        denominator = (\n358\t            full_per_token * full_layers_num\n359\t            + swa_full_tokens_ratio * swa_per_token * swa_layers_num\n360\t        )\n361\t        assert (\n362\t            denominator > 0\n363\t        ), f\"Invalid denominator={denominator} for memory-based allocation. full_per_token={full_per_token}, full_layers_num={full_layers_num}, swa_per_token={swa_per_token}, swa_layers_num={swa_layers_num}, swa_full_tokens_ratio={swa_full_tokens_ratio}\"\n364\t\n365\t        full_tokens = align_page_size(int(total_memory / denominator))\n366\t        swa_tokens = align_page_size(int(full_tokens * swa_full_tokens_ratio))\n367\t\n368\t        logger.info(\n369\t            f\"Use sliding window memory pool. full_layer_tokens={full_tokens}, swa_layer_tokens={swa_tokens}\"\n370\t        )\n371\t        return full_tokens, full_tokens, swa_tokens\n372\t\n373\t    def _calculate_mamba_ratio(self: ModelRunner) -> int:\n374\t        if self.server_args.disable_radix_cache:\n375\t            return 1\n376\t\n377\t        additional_ratio = 0\n378\t        if self.server_args.enable_mamba_extra_buffer():\n379\t            # ping-pong buffer size is 2 when overlap schedule is on, 1      additional_ratio = MAMBA_CACHE_V2_ADDITIONAL_RATIO_NO_OVERLAP\n384\t\n385\t        return MAMBA_CACHE_SIZE_MAX_RUNNING_REQUESTS_RATIO + additional_ratio\n386\t\n387\t    def _init_pools(self: cache_params=config.mamba2_cache_params,\n452\t                    mamba_layer_ids=(\n453\t                        [\n454\t                            i\n455\t                            for i in self.req_to_token_pool = ReqToTokenPool(\n466\t                    size=max_num_reqs,\n467\t                    max_context_len=self.model_config.context_len\n468\t                    +            \"v_head_dim\": self.model_config.hf_text_config.v_head_dim,\n495\t                    }\n496\t                self.token_to_kv_pool = SWAKVPool(\n497\t     try:\n698\t            from mooncake.engine import TransferEngine\n699\t        except ImportError as e:\n700\t            logger.warning(\n701\t                \"Please install mooncake for using def _register_to_engine_info_bootstrap(self):\n714\t        \"\"\"Register transfer engine info with the EngineInfoBootstrapServer via HTTP PUT.\n715\t\n716\t        The bootstrap server runs on node_rank==0. For multi-node setups, the\n717\t        host is derived from dist_init_addr. For single-node, use 127.0.0.1.\n718\t        \"\"\"\n719\t        import requests as http_requests\n720\t\n721\t        if self.server_args.dist_init_addr:\n722\t            # Multi-node: bootstrap server is on the head node (node_rank==0).\n723\t            # Derive host from dist_init_addr (shared across all nodes).\n724\t            bootstrap_host = (\n725\t                NetworkAddress.parse(self.server_args.dist_init_addr).resolved().host\n726\t            )\n727\t        else:\n728\t            bootstrap_host = \"127.0.0.1\"\n729\t\n730\t        bootstrap_port = self.server_args.engine_info_bootstrap_port\n731\t        bootstrap_na = NetworkAddress(bootstrap_host, bootstrap_port)\n732\t        url = f\"{bootstrap_na.to_url()}/register_transfer_engine_info\"\n733\t\n734\t        payload = {\n735\t            \"tp_rank\": self.tp_rank,\n736\t            \"transfer_engine_info\": {\n737\t                \"session_id\": self.remote_instance_transfer_engine_session_id,\n738\t                \"weights_info_dict\": self.remote_instance_transfer_engine_weight_info,\n739\t            },\n740\t        }\n741\t\n742\t        try:\n743\t            resp = http_requests.put(url, json=payload, timeout=5)\n744\t            if resp.status_code == 200:\n745\t                logger.info(\n746\t                    f\"Registered transfer engine info for tp_rank={self.tp_rank} \"\n747\t                    f\"with bootstrap server at {bootstrap_na}\"\n748\t                )\n749\t            else:\n750\t                logger.error(\n751\t                    f\"Failed to register transfer engine info for tp_rank={self.tp_rank}: \"\n752\t                    f\"{resp.status_code}, {resp.text}\"\n753\t                )\n754\t        except Exception as e:\n755\t            logger.error(\n756\t                f\"Failed to register transfer engine info for tp_rank={self.tp_rank}: {e}\"\n757\t            )\n758\t\n759\t    def _publish_modelexpress_metadata(self):\n760\t        \"\"\"Publish TransferEngine metadata to ModelExpress server (seed mode).\"\"\"\n761\t        try:\n762\t            from modelexpress import p2p_pb2\n763\t            from modelexpress.client import MxClient\n764\t        except ImportError as exc:\n765\t            raise ImportError(\n766\t                \"ModelExpress support requires the 'modelexpress' package. \"\n767\t                \"Install it with: pip install modelexpress\"\n768\t            ) from exc\n769\t\n770\t        model_name = (\n771\t            self.server_args.modelexpress_model_name or self.server_args.model_path\n772\t        )\n773\t        mx_url = self.server_args.modelexpress_url\n774\t        session_id = self.remote_instance_transfer_engine_session_id\n775\t        weight_info = self.remote_instance_transfer_engine_weight_info\n776\t\n777\t        if not session_id or weight_info is None:\n778\t            logger.warning(\n779\t                \"ModelExpress source: skipping publish -- \"\n780\t                \"TransferEngine not initialized or no weight info\"\n781\t            )\n782\t            return\n783\t\n784\t        # Build tensor descriptors from weight_info dict\n785\t        tensors = []\n786\t        for name, (addr, numel, element_size) in weight_info.items():\n787\t            tensors.append(\n788\t                p2p_pb2.TensorDescriptor(\n789\t                    name=name,\n790\t                    addr=addr,\n791\t                    size=numel * element_size,\n792\t                    device_id=self.gpu_id,\n793\t                )\n794\t            )\n795\t\n796\t        worker = p2p_pb2.WorkerMetadata(\n797\t            worker_rank=self.tp_rank,\n798\t            transfer_engine_session_id=session_id,\n799\t            tensors=tensors,\n800\t        )\n801\t\n802\t        mx_client = MxClient(server_url=mx_url)\n803\t        try:\n804\t            logger.info(\n805\t                \"ModelExpress source: publishing metadata for model=%s, \"\n806\t                \"tp_rank=%d, session=%s, %d tensors\",\n807\t                model_name,\n808\t                self.tp_rank,\n809\t                session_id,\n810\t                len(tensors),\n811\t            )\n812\t            mx_client.publish_metadata(model_name, [worker])\n813\t            mx_client.publish_ready(\n814\t                model_name,\n815\t                worker_id=self.tp_rank,\n816\t                session_id=mx_client.session_id,\n817\t                metadata_hash=\"\",\n818\t            )\n819\t            logger.info(\n820\t                \"ModelExpress source: published ready for model=%s, tp_rank=%d\",\n821\t                model_name,\n822\t                self.tp_rank,\n823\t            )\n824\t        finally:\n825\t            mx_client.close()\n826\t\n827\t    def model_specific_adjustment(self):\n828\t        server_args = self.model_config.hf_text_config, \"moe_intermediate_size\", None\n873\t            )\n874\t            if moe_intermediate_size is None:\n875\t                return\n876\t\n877\t            if this by setting arguments `--tp` and `--ep` correctly.\"\n887\t                )\n888\t\n889\t    def init_torch_distributed(self):\n890\t        tic = time.perf_counter()\n891\t        logger.info(\"Init torch distributed begin.\")\n892\t\n893\t        try:\n894\t            torch.get_device_module(self.device).set_device(self.gpu_id)\n895\t        except Exception:\n896\t         pass  # A warning will be raised in `init_distributed_environment`\n912\t\n913\t        before_avail_memory = get_available_gpu_memory(self.device, self.gpu_id)\n914\t        if not When set to \"env://\", torch uses MASTER_ADDR/MASTER_PORT\n919\t        # env-vars and an externally-created TCPStore, completely avoiding port\n920\t        # conflicts with intra-host collocation.\n921\t        dist_init_method_override = envs.SGLANG_DISTRIBUTED_INIT_METHOD_OVERRIDE.get()\n922\t        if dist_init_method_override:\n923\t            dist_init_method = dist_init_method_override\n924\t        elif self.server_args.dist_init_addr:\n925\t            na = NetworkAddress.parse(self.server_args.dist_init_addr)\n926\t            dist_init_method = na.to_tcp()\n927\t        else:\n928\t            dist_init_method = NetworkAddress(\n929\t                self.server_args.host or \"127.0.0.1\", self.dist_port\n930\t            ).to_tcp()\n931\t        set_custom_all_reduce(not self.server_args.disable_custom_all_reduce)\n932\t        set_mscclpp_all_reduce(self.server_args.enable_mscclpp)\n933\t        set_torch_symm_mem_all_reduce(self.server_args.enable_torch_symm_mem)\n934\t\n935\t        if not self.is_draft_worker:\n936\t            if self.device == \"cpu\":\n937\t                if _is_cpu_amx_available or _is_cpu_arm64:\n938\t                    # Only initialize the distributed environment on the target model worker.\n955\t            init_distributed_environment(\n956\t                backend=backend,\n957\t                world_size=self.tp_size * self.pp_size,\n958\t                rank=self.tp_size * self.pp_rank + self.tp_rank,\n959\t                local_rank=self.gpu_id,\n960\t                distributed_init_method=dist_init_method,\n961\t                timeout=self.server_args.dist_timeout,\n962\t                moe_a2a_backend=self.server_args.moe_a2a_backend,\n963\t            )\n964\t            initialize_model_parallel(\n965\t                tensor_model_parallel_size=self.tp_size,\n966\t                attention_data_parallel_size=self.dp_size,\n967\t                pipeline_model_parallel_size=self.pp_size,\n968\t                expert_model_parallel_size=self.moe_ep_size,\n969\t                attention_context_model_parallel_size=self.attn_cp_size,\n970\t                moe_data_model_parallel_size=self.moe_dp_size,\n971\t                duplicate_tp_group=self.server_args.enable_pdmux,\n972\t            )\n973\t            initialize_dp_attention(\n974\t                server_args=self.server_args,\n975\t                model_config=self.model_config,\n976\t            )\n977\t            if is_npu():\n978\t                register_sgl_tp_rank(self.gpu_id)\n979\t\n980\t            # Pre-warm NCCL/RCCL to eliminate cold-start latency in first request\n981\t            # Controlled by --pre-warm-nccl flag (default: enabled on AMD GPUs)\n982\t            if self.server_args.pre_warm_nccl and (\n983\t                self.tp_size > 1 or self.pp_size > 1 or self.moe_ep_size > 1\n984\t            ):\n985\t                warmup_start = time.perf_counter()\n986\t                tp_group_handle = get_tp_group().device_group\n987\t\n988\t                # Single warmup all_reduce to initialize NCCL/RCCL communicator\n989\t                warmup_tensor = torch.zeros(1, device=torch.cuda.current_device())\n990\t                dist.all_reduce(warmup_tensor, group=tp_group_handle)\n991\t                torch.cuda.synchronize()\n992\t\n993\t                warmup_elapsed = time.perf_counter() - warmup_start\n994\t                logger.info(\n995\t                    f\"NCCL/RCCL warmup completed in {warmup_elapsed:.3f}s \"\n996\t                    f\"(tp_size={self.tp_size}, pp_size={self.pp_size}, ep_size={self.moe_ep_size})\"\n997\t                )\n998\t\n999\t        pre_model_load_memory = get_available_gpu_memory(\n1000\t            self.device,\n1001\t            self.gpu_id,\n1002\t            distributed=get_world_group().world_size > 1,\n1003\t            cpu_group=get_world_group().cpu_group,\n1004\t        )\n1005\t        self.tp_group = get_tp_group()\n1006\t        self.pp_group = get_pp_group()\n1007\t        self.attention_tp_group = get_attention_tp_group()\n1008\t\n1009\t        # Check memory for tensor parallelism\n1010\t        local_gpu_memory = get_available_gpu_memory(self.device, self.gpu_id)\n1011\t        if self.tp_size > 1 and not self.is_draft_worker:\n1012\t            if pre_model_load_memory < local_gpu_memory * 0.9:\n1013\t                msg = \"The memory capacity is unbalanced. Iterating over all requests (pid_req from 0 to total_requests-1)\n39\t    2. Checking if step_indices_raw[pid_req] >= 0 (valid mask)\n40\t    3. If valid, performing the scatter:\n41\t       dst[l, dst_indices_raw[pid_req], :] = src[l, pid_req, step_indices_raw[pid_req], :]\n42\t\n43\t    Grid: (total_requests, num_layers, ceil(elem_per_entry / BLOCK_SIZE))\n44\t    \"\"\"\n45\t    pid_req = tl.program_id(0)\n46\t    pid_layer = tl.program_id(1).to(tl.int64)\n47\t    pid_block = tl.program_id(2).to(tl.int64)\n48\t\n49\t    # Load step index to check validity (step >= 0 means valid)\n50\t    step_idx = tl.load(step_indices_raw_ptr + pid_req).to(tl.int64)\n51\t\n52\t    # Early exit if this request is not valid (step < 0)\n53\t    if step_idx < 0:\n54\t        return\n55\t\n56\t    # Load destination index\n57\t    dst_idx = tl.load(dst_indices_raw_ptr + pid_req).to(tl.int64)\n58\t\n59\t    # Source index is just the request index itself\n60\t    src_idx = pid_req\n61\t\n62\t    # Bounds check to avoid illegal memory access\n63\t    if not (\n64\t        (dst_idx >= 0)\n65\t        & (dst_idx < dst_req_size)\n66\t        & (src_idx >= 0)\n67\t        & (src_idx < src_req_size)\n68\t        & (step_idx < src_step_size)\n69\t    ):\n70\t        return\n71\t\n72\t    # Compute base offsets\n73\t    src_offset = (\n74\t        pid_layer * src_layer_stride\n75\t        + src_idx * src_req_stride\n76\t        + step_idx * src_step_stride\n77\t    )\n78\t    dst_offset = pid_layer * dst_layer_stride + dst_idx * dst_req_stride\n79\t\n80\t    # Compute element range for this block\n81\t    start = pid_block * BLOCK_SIZE\n82\t    offsets = start + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE)\n83\t    mask = offsets < elem_per_entry\n84\t\n85\t    # Load from source and store to destination\n86\t    data = tl.load(src_ptr + src_offset + offsets, mask=mask)\n87\t    tl.store(dst_ptr + dst_offset + offsets, data, mask=mask)\n88\t\n89\t\n90\tdef fused_mamba_state_scatter_with_mask(\n91\t    dst: torch.Tensor,  # [num_layers, cache_size, *state_shape]\n92\t    src: torch.Tensor,  # [num_layers, spec_size, draft_tokens, *state_shape]\n93\t    dst_indices_raw: torch.Tensor,  # [total_requests] - raw indices (e.g., state_indices_tensor)\n94\t    step_indices_raw: torch.Tensor,  # [total_requests] - raw step indices (step >= 0 means valid)\n95\t):\n96\t    \"\"\"\n97\t    Fully fused gather-scatter with built-in masking for mamba state updates.\n98\t\n99\t    This function fuses the following operations into a single kernel:\n100\t    1. valid_mask = step_indices_raw >= 0\n101\t    2. valid_indices = valid_mask.nonzero()\n102\t    3. dst_indices = dst_indices_raw[valid_indices]  (index_select)\n103\t    4. step_indices = step_indices_raw[valid_indices]  (index_select)\n104\t    5. for each valid i: dst[:, dst_indices[i], :] = src[:, i, step_indices[i], :]\n105\t\n106\t
